subject: [PATCH v9 04/15] userfaultfd: test uffd VMA flags through the vma_flags_t API

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch updates the userfaultfd VMA flag helpers to use the vma_flags_t accessor, which is a single point of truth for available modes on the current build. The change does not introduce any functional changes as the same bits are read and the masks fold to the same code. This ensures consistency across different compilers and architectures.
